In cases where shipments incur abnormal costs (including but not limited to taxes, penalties, destruction fees, etc.) due to incorrect declared value, prohibited goods, inaccurate declaration, or intellectual property violations, the final decision will be based on the destination customs authority, and all incurred costs will be charged back to the sender.
